chunks.text: VPN | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar VPN The Remote Access VPN (Virtual Private Network) service allows CalNet ID authenticated users to connect to the UC Berkeley network from outside of campus, as if th

Berkeley network from outside of campus, as if they were on campus, and encrypts the information sent to the network. Our campus VPN service is the bSecure Remote Access VPN, based on the GlobalProtect application from Palo Alto Networks. Go to the

ct application from Palo Alto Networks. Go to the bSecure Remote Access VPN site for more information and download instructions. If you have admin access to your computer, you can download and install the software yourself: Download GlobalProtect Sof

the software yourself: Download GlobalProtect Software . Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
